name: Pumpkin Whoopie Pies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the brown sugar and oil.
2. Add pumpkin and eggs, mixing well.
3. Combine all remaining ingredients and mix into the creamed mixture.
4. Drop large spoonfuls of the batter onto a greased baking sheet.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 - 12 minutes.
6. Prepare the filling by combining all ingredients and mixing well.
7. To make whoopie pies, spread filling on the flat side of one cookie and sandwich with another cookie.
8. Store in an airtight container.
